calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2019 Off Calendar

Motion For Prove-Up And Notice Of Court Reporter Pursuant To Sflr 6.6d7
Off Calendar Dec-03-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Kristo Regjo and AMR Industry Enterprises, Inc., a California corporation.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Adriana P. Robles, CSR #1412. Telephone: 415-551-0332. Email: arobles@sftc.org.

Plaintiff Jie Zhao, doing business as PNP International Group, was present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Kristo Regjo or AMR Industry Enterprises, Inc., a California corporation.
Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on December 2, 2016.
Substitute service on defendant AMR Industry Enterprises, Inc.'s Agent of Process occurred on October 23, 2018, and was effectuated on November 5, 2018.
Substitute service on defendant Kristo Regjo occurred on October 23, 2018, and was effectuated on November 5, 2018.
Default as to defendants Kristo Regjo and AMR Industry Enterprises, Inc. was entered on July 12, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on July 12, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Jie Zhao, doing business as PNP International Group, and against the defaulted defendants Kristo Regjo and AMR Industry Enterprises, Inc., a California corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $30,000.00.
Costs - $450.00.
Total - $30,450.00.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2019 Continued To Dec-24-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Dec-24-2019 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Court orders notice of Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)
